data.title: record-test-status: _is_astgrep_sg() helper lacks unit tests for ast-grep vs shadow-utils disambiguation
data.description: The _is_astgrep_sg() helper added in plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh to distinguish ast-grep from Ubuntu shadow-utils sg has no dedicated unit test. Two cases need coverage: (1) Ubuntu sg present but not ast-grep (sg --version output does not match ^(sg|ast-grep) [0-9]) should return 1; (2) ast-grep present (version string matches pattern) should return 0. Regression risk if sg --version output format changes.
